metaBuilds.title: Physical Bruiser
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for magical survivability, online around minute 25 — about 4,710 effective HP vs magical in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Steel deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite; you give up 36% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Bayle deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite; you give up 36% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Greystone deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 36% of its bite; you give up 36% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Zarus's main threat is Coliseum; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite; you give up 36% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Aurora deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 34% of its bite; you give up 36% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Terra ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 24% of its bite; you give up 36% of your damage.

laneSteer.provenance: “Lust For Blood” ⇒ sustain; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field offlane 50.7% over 314,656 games, magnitude not simulated.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 26% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Serath's main threat is Chastise; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 26% of its bite; you give up 26% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Boris deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite; you give up 26% of your damage.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 26% of its bite; you give up 26% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale. Kallari's main threat is Guillotine; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 26% of its bite; you give up 26% of your damage.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite; you give up 26% of your damage.
